title: schefflera nervosa
intro: Schefflera nervosa, also known as the umbrella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant contains various medicinal properties, including alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. Schefflera nervosa has been traditionally used to alleviate stress, anxiety, and insomnia due to its adaptogenic properties, promoting relaxation and improving overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Schefflera nervosa include infusions and tinctures, often used to treat neurological disorders and promote a balanced nervous system.
